ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Travel class of the passenger (1 = First Class, 2 = Second Class, 3 = Third Class) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Passenger fare */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Embarkation point */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "lifeboat_number" INTEGER /* Lifeboat number the passenger was on, if applicable */,
  "rescue_location" TEXT /* Rescue location of the passenger, if applicable */,
  "passenger_image" TEXT /* Reference to an image of the passenger (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES travel_classes ("pclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_classes" (
  "pclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel class */,
  "pclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel class (e.g., First Class, Second Class, Third Class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel class */,
  "fare_range" TEXT /* Typical fare range for the travel class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the travel class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers that can be accommodated in the travel class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "booked_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was booked */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the ticket */,
  "booking_agent" TEXT /* Name or ID of the booking agent who sold the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" INTEGER /* Deck on which the cabin is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the cabin */,
  "deck_level" INTEGER /* Level of the deck on which the cabin is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarkation_point" TEXT /* Embarkation point (e.g., S = Southampton, C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation point */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the embarkation point is located */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship departed from the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the passenger */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the passenger */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_demographics_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival status entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "lifeboat_number" INTEGER /* Lifeboat number the passenger was on, if applicable */,
  "rescue_location" TEXT /* Rescue location of the passenger, if applicable */,
  "rescue_date" TEXT /* Date when the passenger was rescued, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_status_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home or office address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "role_effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the role is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
